calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Henry Shain, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:20am
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Damien Morozumi, Esq. appears for Respondent De Soto Cab Cooperative, Appellant Ronald Schwartz appears in Pro Per. (This case is related to #028294: Ronald Schwartze v. De Soto; Case No. 028306 is Mr. Swartze's cross complaint.) Both cases are heard together and the files were previously combined for both cases. All evidence is marked with DeSoto as Respondent/Plaintiff and Mr. Swartz as appellant/Deft.
Mr. Morozumi gives a brief opening statement, then calls 1st witness, previously sworn, and begins direct examination:
Emanuel Neweke S/E
EXHR1 2 color photos
EXHR2 1 81/2 by 11 color photo of cars
EXHR3 1 81/2 by 11 color photo of cars
EXHR4 1 81/2 by 11 color photo of cars
EXHR5 1 81/2 BY 11 color photo (of a store at the intersection in question)
9:35am
Cross-examination by Mr. Schwartz, then Mr. Schwartz presents his case. No witnesses were called by Mr. Schwartz
EXHA(A) color photo of intersection in question
EXHA(B) " " " " " " (alternate view)
10:10am
Brief closing statements by parties.
10:15am
Matter is submitted. Exhibits were returned to the parties after the hearing, no evidence is retained in the file.
